name: Doom8088 (Mode 13h, low detail)
description: FrenkelS/Doom8088 v20260304 - MCGA 320x200 256-color, 8088 low-detail build (D8M13L.EXE). WAD: shareware DOOM1.

playTips: Press Enter a few times on the boot splash and difficulty settings to get in-game.
This game takes around 30 seconds to load from that menu with no feedback.
Arrows to move, CTRL to fire.
